objective: Restore successful request processing after a deployment issue.
incident_summary: Error rate increased after a deployment.
logs: INFO: Decoding input payload. ERROR: Tokenizer version mismatch detected. Expected tokenizer compatible with model v1.0.4, found tokenizer v2.0.1. ERROR: Failed to tokenize request due to unrecognized subword mapping.
recent_deploy: Deployed tokenizer package v2.0.1 15 minutes ago. Model version remained unchanged.
